title: ochna crassinervia
intro: Ochna crassinervia, also known as the African bird's eye or bitter cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochna crassinervia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
